title: Aberemoa bracteosa
taxonomy: Aberemoa bracteosa is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae, commonly known as the melastome family. This family comprises approximately 170 genera and over 5,000 species. The Melastomataceae family is native to the tropical and subtropical regions of the world, primarily in Central and South America, Africa, and Southeast Asia. Aberemoa bracteosa, in particular, is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. Further research is needed to determine its specific classification within the Melastomataceae family.
